title: croton dinghuensis
intro: Croton dinghuensis, also known as Dinghu croton, is a species of plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to China and used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and anti-bacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin infections. The health benefits of Croton dinghuensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared in herbal teas or infusions, and can also be used in the form of capsules or tinctures.
